settings_webhook_signature_failed: ✗ Signature failed — check your signing secret
settings_closed_none_upcoming: No upcoming closed dates in the next year.
settings_closed_owner_note: Company holidays are set by an owner under Online Booking. You cannot edit them here.
settings_holiday_catalog_off_help: Holidays aren't tracked. Every day stays bookable.
settings_holiday_policy_closed_detail: Clients can't book. Your team can still schedule, with a warning.
settings_holiday_policy_request_detail: Clients can request a time; you confirm each one.
settings_holiday_policy_open_notice: Bookings are currently open on holidays. Change this under Advanced.
settings_holiday_open_warning: Customers can still book on listed holidays (e.g. Thanksgiving). Use Block or Allow with notice if that is not intended.
settings_holiday_panel_desc: Apply federal and state holidays to public booking and internal scheduling.
settings_holiday_concierge_desc: Bookings on holiday dates stay pending until someone on your team confirms.
settings_holiday_concierge_warn: Bookings may confirm without review on holiday dates.
settings_holiday_confirm_message: Customers can still book on listed holidays. Confirm only if that is intentional.
settings_holiday_coverage_warn: Built-in holiday dates run through {year}. Bookings after that won't be flagged as holidays automatically — add them below as custom dates, or update the app for newer years.
settings_teamsched_desc: Weekly hours and time off live under My Schedule
settings_timeoff_desc: Personal time off lives on the calendar. Add or edit blocks there — this list is a quick view of what you already scheduled.
settings_dateoverrides_use_suffix: for new time off. This list shows synced Google busy days and older date blocks.
settings_schedlinks_deeplink_hint: This link pre-selects you on the company booking page.
settings_schedlinks_not_ready: Your personal booking link appears after your company and user slugs are configured.
settings_schedlinks_ics_desc: The current ICS subscription uses a company token and shows scheduled inspections. It is not a per-inspector busy feed, does not import busy time, and does not update Google Calendar; use the connection above for availability sync.
settings_companylink_share_hint: Share the company link — clients are matched with the first available inspector.
settings_calconnect_desc: Keep external busy time out of your available booking hours.
settings_calconnect_personal_note: Calendar connections are personal. Select Myself above to manage your Google Calendar.
settings_calconnect_oauth_not_configured: Google OAuth is not configured. Ask a company admin to configure it under Communication.
settings_calpicker_desc: Pick which calendars are checked for conflicts. Bookings are written to just one.
settings_calpicker_write_only_editable: Only calendars you can edit can receive bookings.
settings_gcal_mode_platform_desc: Use the hosted platform OAuth app for inspector connections.
settings_gcal_mode_own_desc: Use your company Google Cloud OAuth client.
settings_gcal_selfhost_note: Self-hosted deployments use their own Google Cloud OAuth app.
settings_gcal_client_id_hint: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console
settings_gcal_client_secret_hint: Paired with the Client ID above
settings_policies_concierge_desc: Agent-submitted bookings must be approved by you before the client receives a confirmation link.
settings_policies_signed_desc: Clients must sign the inspection agreement before the booking is confirmed.
settings_policies_choice_label: Allow clients to choose their inspector
settings_policies_choice_desc: When off, bookings are auto-assigned to the first available inspector.
settings_slotrules_desc: Choose how bookable start times are generated from inspector availability windows. Defaults are Fixed time slots / 30 minutes.
settings_slotrules_fixed_desc: Starts align to each availability window’s start time, then step by the interval.
settings_slotrules_open_desc: Starts snap to the clock (e.g. :00 / :30) at every interval inside each window.
settings_embed_no_company: No company configured — embed widget unavailable.
settings_integrations_qbo_desc: Sync invoices, contacts, and payment status in real time.
settings_integrations_gcal_desc: Two-way sync for inspection scheduling and availability.
settings_integrations_places_desc: Address autocomplete and property data enrichment.
settings_integrations_resend_desc: Transactional email delivery for reports and notifications.
settings_integrations_zapier_desc: Connect to 5,000+ apps with no-code workflows.
settings_integrations_gemini_desc: AI-powered inspection assistance and defect detection.
settings_stripe_subtitle: Connect your own Stripe account to accept card payments on invoices.
settings_stripe_verify_flow: (any future date / CVC) to verify the flow before going live.
settings_stripe_publishable_hint: Sent to the browser to render the card field. Starts with pk_test_ (test) or pk_live_ (live).
settings_stripe_secret_hint: Server-side key that creates the charge. Starts with sk_test_ or sk_live_. Never shared with the browser.
settings_stripe_webhook_secret_hint: Verifies payment notifications. Found after you add the webhook endpoint below (starts with whsec_).
settings_stripe_webhook_desc_prefix: In Stripe → Developers → Webhooks, add an endpoint for the
settings_stripe_webhook_desc_suffix: event pointing at this URL, then paste its signing secret above. If you registered an endpoint before, re-point it to this URL — the signing secret stays the same.
settings_stripe_no_deliveries_prefix: No deliveries yet. In Stripe → Developers → Webhooks → your endpoint, click
settings_video_subtitle: Choose the video storage backend for this instance.
settings_video_r2_desc: Videos are stored in your Cloudflare R2 bucket — no extra cost beyond R2 storage rates.
settings_video_stream_desc: enables adaptive bitrate playback and requires a paid Stream subscription plus the
settings_video_subdomain_hint_prefix: Found in your Cloudflare Stream dashboard under
settings_dataexport_desc: Download a copy of all your data including inspections, reports, templates, and client information.
settings_turnstile_desc: Bot protection prevents automated form submissions on public-facing pages. Get keys at
settings_turnstile_secret_hint: Bot protection on booking and signup forms. Create at dash.cloudflare.com → Turnstile. Use test key 1x0000000000000000000000000000000AA for development
settings_2fa_enabled: Enabled. Required at every log in.
settings_intkeys_desc: These integrations enhance the inspection workflow. All are optional — features degrade gracefully when unconfigured.
settings_intkeys_places_hint: Address autocomplete on booking and new inspection forms. Create at console.cloud.google.com → Places API
settings_intkeys_estated_hint: Auto-fills Property Facts (year built, sqft, bedrooms). Get at estated.com → API
settings_intkeys_baseurl_hint: Public URL of your deployment (e.g. https://app.yourdomain.com). Used in email links
settings_stripeconnect_desc: Accept card payments on invoices via your Stripe Express account. Create your account at
settings_stripeconnect_desc_suffix: , then paste the account ID below.
settings_ai_desc: Google Gemini powers comment assist and inspection summaries. Get a key at
settings_ai_key_hint: Powers AI comment suggestions and smart field completion. Get at aistudio.google.com/apikey
settings_emaildelivery_own_missing: Own provider selected but no sender address / {provider} credentials — emails will fail to send.
settings_emaildelivery_platform_missing: No platform email is configured (SENDER_EMAIL / Resend) — emails cannot be sent.
settings_emaildelivery_inspector_note: Emails use each inspector’s name & email; inspectors without a name fall back to the company.
settings_emaildelivery_mode_platform_des: Send from the platform mailbox. You can set the display name and reply-to; the address is fixed.
settings_emaildelivery_mode_own_desc: Send from your own email provider. Choose the provider and add its credentials under Email API keys below, plus a verified sender address.
settings_emaildelivery_selfhost_note: Self-hosted deployments send from your own email provider. Choose a provider (Resend, SendGrid, Postmark, or Mailgun) and add its credentials plus a verified sender address under Email API keys below to enable email.
settings_emaildelivery_sender_verified: Must be a domain verified in your {provider} account.
settings_emaildelivery_set_company_link: Set your company name in Settings › Workspace
settings_emaildelivery_override_name: Use a different name for email From
settings_emaildelivery_replyto_required: * required when Point of Contact is Company
settings_emaildelivery_poc_inspector: Sending inspector (replies go to that inspector)
settings_emailsecrets_webhook_resend_hin: Resend → Webhooks → Signing Secret (starts with whsec_). Point the webhook at the URL below.
settings_emailsecrets_webhook_sendgrid_h: SendGrid → Settings → Mail Settings → Event Webhook → Signed Event Webhook (base64 public key). Point the webhook at the URL below.
settings_emailsecrets_webhook_postmark_h: A shared token you choose. Append it as ?token=… on the webhook URL below (Postmark → Servers → Webhooks).
settings_emailsecrets_webhook_mailgun_hi: Mailgun → Settings → Webhooks → HTTP webhook signing key. Point the webhook at the URL below.
settings_emailsecrets_desc: Without email configured, password resets and booking confirmations will not be sent. Choose your email provider and enter its API credentials.
settings_emailsecrets_resend_key_hint: Email delivery for reports, confirmations, and password resets. Get your key at resend.com → API Keys
settings_emailsecrets_sendgrid_key_hint: Starts with SG. — SendGrid → Settings → API Keys
settings_emailsecrets_deliverability_des: Configure {provider} to send bounce & spam-complaint events here so suppressed addresses are never emailed again.
settings_smssecrets_twilio_intro: Add your Twilio Account SID, Auth Token, and a sending number. New numbers must be registered for
settings_smssecrets_twilio_intro_suffix: before they can text US numbers.
settings_smssecrets_twilio_sid_hint: Starts with AC, 34 chars. Twilio Console → Account Info
settings_smssecrets_twilio_token_hint: Paired with the Account SID. Also verifies inbound STOP/START webhooks.
settings_smssecrets_twilio_from_hint: Your sending number in E.164, e.g. +15551234567
settings_smssecrets_telnyx_intro: Add your Telnyx API key, sending number, and public key. Configure your number in the
settings_smssecrets_telnyx_intro_suffix: . Outbound SMS plus inbound STOP/HELP parity are both fully operational once the public key is set.
settings_smssecrets_telnyx_key_hint: Telnyx Mission Control → API Keys. Keep this secret.
settings_smssecrets_telnyx_from_hint: Your Telnyx sending number in E.164, e.g. +15551234567
settings_smssecrets_telnyx_pubkey_hint: Telnyx Mission Control → your Messaging Profile → Public Key. Used to verify inbound STOP/HELP webhooks.
settings_smssecrets_inbound_placeholder: Save your company first to see this URL
settings_smssecrets_inbound_note_telnyx: Paste this into your Telnyx number’s inbound webhook so STOP/HELP replies sync. Set your Public Key above so we can verify these webhooks.
settings_smssecrets_inbound_note_twilio: Paste this into your Twilio number’s Messaging webhook so STOP/START replies sync.
settings_smsdelivery_desc: Send appointment and report text messages by SMS. Clients are texted only after they opt in — STOP replies are honored automatically. With your own provider you pay the carrier’s per-message rates directly.
settings_smsdelivery_byo_desc: Bring your own account. You pay provider rates directly and control your numbers.
settings_smsdelivery_shared_desc: Send from a platform-managed shared number. No setup needed.
settings_smsdelivery_dedicated_desc: Your own local number, managed by the platform. Complete TCR/TFV registration below.
settings_smsdelivery_selfhost_note: Self-hosted deployments text from your own SMS provider (Twilio or Telnyx). Choose a provider and add its credentials below to enable SMS.
settings_smsdelivery_not_configured: SMS not configured — set your provider credentials below
settings_smsdelivery_phone_note_prefix: Shown in your texts as the call-back number (
settings_discount_desc: Promo codes clients can apply at booking.
settings_qual_leave_unchecked: Leave all unchecked to allow all staff.
settings_services_empty: No services yet. Click "Add service" to create your first.
settings_mcw_rejection_note: Correct the issue above, update your business info below, and click “Fix & resubmit”.
settings_mcw_active_banner: Managed SMS is active and ready to send.
settings_mcw_in_progress: Registration is in progress. Twilio typically completes this within 1–5 business days.
settings_mcw_carrier_note: Which carrier provisions and manages this tenant’s dedicated number.
settings_mcw_business_info_desc: Required for 10DLC brand/campaign registration or toll-free verification. Submitted directly to The Campaign Registry (TCR) or Twilio.
settings_mcw_channel_10dlc_desc: Dedicated local number via brand + campaign (TCR). Best for high-volume A2P.
settings_mcw_channel_tollfree_desc: 800-series number with toll-free verification. Simpler approval, lower throughput.
settings_mcw_areacode_hint: 3-digit area code for number search. Leave blank for any.
